title: ZXSpace Game Modes
description: Understand the verified ZXSpace solo city-defence mode and the current status of multiplayer menu availability.
summary: ZXSpace release-ready documentation centers on the verified solo city-defence shooter loop.

sections.heading: Solo play
paragraphs: Solo play is the verified ZXSpace gameplay path documented for release readiness.
The solo loop covers alien formations, city defence, shields, lives, wave completion, score chasing, coin rewards, power-ups, and rewarded continue.

sections.heading: Mode status
paragraphs: ZXSpace supports both Local PVP and World PVP menu paths, while release behavior is finalised as new updates are confirmed.
This documentation does not describe a separate finished multiplayer gameplay contract until that release behavior is verified.

sections.heading: What to choose
paragraphs: Use Solo play for current documented progression, achievements, score ranking, and coin rewards.
Review this page again before release if multiplayer menu availability changes.

faq.question: Is ZXSpace multiplayer documented as a release feature?
faq.answer: No. The verified documentation focuses on Solo play. Multiplayer availability will be confirmed as new release details are finalised.

featureShowcases.heading: ZXSpace game modes
featureShowcases.summary: Game Modes explains how ZXSpace structures alien waves, cannon movement, city defence, and survival pressure.
body: This matters because players need to know what kind of session they are starting and how success is measured.
Players use this page to choose the right mode for a quick game, a focused practice run, or a score-chasing session.
bullets: Connects mode choice to controls, tips, and leaderboards.
Keeps App Store-friendly wording focused on gameplay.

image.caption: ZXSpace mode artwork supports the game mode explanation.
